description: Document of sale of a house (intaqala...), dated 28 Muḥarram 587 AH, which is 25 February 1191 CE. (Though note that Khan at one time read the date as 787 AH, see ALAD p. 45 n. 143.) Mentions Hārūn al-dhimmī. Could also be a qāḍī court record because of the numerous fuṣūʿ it contains. (Information from Baker/Polliack catalog.)
description_he: מסמך מכר של בית, מתוארך 28 מוחרם 587 להג'רה, 25 בפברואר 1191 לספירה. מוזכר הארון אל-ד'מי.
